synopsis: *Darth Vader* may be the most feared man in the galaxy, but to the proud Grand Moffs of the Empire he is merely the Emperor's apprentice, ranked below them in the hierarchy. What fury burns in the heart of a Sith with such overwhelming rage when a mere Moff dares to command him? And at what point does Vader show them his true power?
title: Age Of Rebellion: Darth Vader
